summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SP630E RGBWW LED Controller web application. All backend APIs working perfectly (10/10 tests passed). Frontend demo mode functionality fully operational with all 5 channel sliders, preset management, schedule creation, animation effects, and settings working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API health check (GET /api/)
Create preset (POST /api/presets)
List presets (GET /api/presets)
Toggle preset favorite (PUT /api/presets/{id}/favorite)
Delete preset (DELETE /api/presets/{id})
Create schedule (POST /api/schedules)
List schedules (GET /api/schedules)
Toggle schedule (PUT /api/schedules/{id}/toggle)
Delete schedule (DELETE /api/schedules/{id})
Frontend connection page loads with 'CİHAZ ARA' button
Demo mode button works to enter control panel
5 channel sliders (red, green, blue, warmWhite, coolWhite) visible and functional
'HEPSİ AÇ' button sets all channels to 100%
'HEPSİ KAPAT' button sets all channels to 0%
Color preview panel updates dynamically
Tabs navigation works (control, presets, schedule, animation, settings)
Preset save form works (show form, enter name, save)
Preset list loads from backend and presets can be loaded
Schedule creation form works with time and day selection
Animation panel shows 4 animation buttons and fade animation works
Settings tab shows device info and disconnect button works
